import openai
from functools import lru_cache

# Correct: use an LRU cache (or disk cache like langchain.cache) to save duplicate LLM queries
@lru_cache(maxsize=1000)
def get_answer(question):
    resp = openai.Completion.create(model="gpt-3.5-turbo", prompt=question)
    return resp.choices[0].text
